summary: The user is focused on tracking their Instagram engagement and growing their following, particularly in relation to their fitness journey that began in early March. They are experimenting with various content formats, including Instagram Reels and are considering using IGTV for more in-depth content like workout tutorials and nutrition plans.
facts: The user started using Instagram more seriously in early March 2023 after joining the gym. The user has been using hashtags like #FitnessJourney and #ReelsOfTheWeek to connect with like-minded individuals. The user is currently posting consistently and engaging with others on Instagram. The user plans to try IGTV first for creating in-depth content, such as workout tutorials and nutrition plans. The user is open to exploring IG Live in the future but prefers the editing flexibility of IGTV. The user is focused on optimizing their IGTV videos for better engagement and visibility. The user is interested in promoting their IGTV videos through organic and paid strategies.
